transcription.text: Ketchup, tomatoes, onions, mustard, ketchup, and mayonnaise, cheese, lettuce, and onions, onions, mustard, and pickles, tomatoes, relish, and cheese. At Wendy's, you get lots and lots of your favorite toppings. Anyone who offers less is giving you less of a hamburger.
